evidence: "Loved this clean and funny comedy special by a fresh, relatively new comedian."
"One of the best animation pics ever. Love it."
"I really hope he continues to grow his audience because I think he’s better than most of the so-called seasoned comics."
"It's refreshing to listen to a comedian who doesn't have to use profanity every few words or so."
"He has material that’s not only hilarious, but fresh and clean enough to get the hilarity of the joke."
"I liked this comedy special more than I like most of the other ones."
"I must say, this comedy special was very entertaining (more than most)."
"It's apparent she is just 'winging it' on stage, not actually taking time to practice the skill it obviously takes to be funny."
"I had never heard of him prior to watching his special, but after seeing him perform, I'll be looking for him as I want to hear more stories about his adventures and his wife and kids."
"I will look for this comedian in the future."
"He really works his facial expressions (and vocals) to deliver physical comedy to those like me, who really like it."
"Preacher gets very animated with his joke-telling and I like that he puts his all into it."
"I had high hopes when I first clicked to watch this special from the beginning."
"I was bored the day I start to watch it. Wow! Totally unexpected pleasure."

summary: The user has a strong preference for clean and relatable comedy, particularly enjoying animated films. They value high-quality performances and prefer straightforward narratives that evoke laughter without relying on vulgarity.
